title: Manchego Grilled Steak with Bouquet Garni
description: A simple and flavorful grilled steak recipe featuring Manchego cheese and a classic French herb bouquet garni. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Season the flank steak with salt and pepper.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches 130°F for medium-rare.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Meanwhile, heat a skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the crumbled Manchego cheese and cook until melted.
To assemble, place the sliced steak on a plate and top with the Manchego cheese mixture.
Garnish with additional parsley, if desired.
